zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara De Seaton於大約1236年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾時，她的父親Sir Adam de Seton of Seton38歲，母親Janet Giffard45歲。她於大約1256年與William de Keith Marischal of Scotland在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara De Seaton于大约1236年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾时，她的父亲Sir Adam de Seton of Seton38岁，母亲Janet Giffard45岁。她于大约1256年与William de Keith Marischal of Scotland在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她埋葬在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾比。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Seaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Seton
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seeton
meanings: Scottish or English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Sitton
meanings: English (London): possibly a variant of   Seaton  .
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): variant of   Sutton  .

variants.name: Seabrook
meanings: English (Middlesex and Hertfordshire): habitational name from Seabrook in Ivinghoe (Buckinghamshire), possibly from an Old English personal name Sǣga or Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara De Seaton was born about 1236, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Adam de Seton of Seton, was 38 and her mother, Janet Giffard, was 45. She married William de Keith Marischal of Scotland about 1256, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She was buried in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Barbara De Seaton est née environ 1236, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Adam de Seton of Seton, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Janet Giffard, avait 45 ans. Elle a épousé William de Keith Marischal of Scotland environ 1256, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elleenterrée à Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Barbara De Seaton um 1236 in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Adam de Seton of Seton 38 und ihre Mutter Janet Giffard 45. Sie hat um 1256 in Scotland William de Keith Marischal of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie wurde in Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara De Seaton è nata il circa 1236 nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Adam de Seton of Seton, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Janet Giffard, aveva 45 anni. Lei sposato William de Keith Marischal of Scotland circa 1256, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolta a Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Barbara De Seatonが約1236年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Adam de Seton of Setonは38歳，母Janet Giffardは45歳であった。約1256年にスコットランドでWilliam de Keith Marischal of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハンビにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara De Seaton(이)가 대략 1236년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Adam de Seton of Seton(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Giffard(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 대략 1256년 스컷랜드에서 William de Keith Marischal of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 훔비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Barbara De Seaton nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Adam de Seton of Seton, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Janet Giffard, tinha 45 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Keith Marischal of Scotland aproximadamente 1256, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara De Seaton родилась около 1236 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Adam de Seton of Seton было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Giffard, 45. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Keith Marischal of Scotland около 1256 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности хумби, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Barbara De Seaton nació aproximadamente 1236, en Kincardineshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Adam de Seton of Seton, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Janet Giffard, tenía 45 años. Se casó con William de Keith Marischal of Scotland aproximadamente 1256, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Fue sepultada en Humbie, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.
